note: Vulnerability classes documented in OWASP Juice Shop that a black box pentest is expected to surface. ARCHON findings are matched to a class by CWE, by OWASP tag, or by keywords in the title and description. This scores class level coverage, not individual Juice Shop challenge names.

classes.name: Broken authentication, weak or default credentials, no rate limit
classes.keywords: broken auth|weak password|default cred|rate limit|brute force|password reset|account lockout

classes.name: Broken access control and IDOR
classes.keywords: idor|access control|authoriz|other user|another user|basket|privilege escal|admin section|forced browsing

classes.name: Sensitive data and information exposure (errors, backups, /ftp files)
classes.keywords: sensitive data|information disclosure|information exposure|exposed|backup file|/ftp|error message|stack trace|directory listing|confidential

classes.name: Path traversal and LFI (/ftp poison null byte)
classes.keywords: path traversal|directory traversal|local file inclusion|lfi|poison null byte|arbitrary file read

classes.name: JWT weaknesses (none algorithm, forged token)
classes.keywords: jwt|json web token|none algorithm|forged token|unsigned token|token signature

classes.name: Other injection (NoSQL, command, code)
classes.keywords: nosql injection|command injection|code injection|os command|expression injection|server side template

classes.name: Vulnerable or outdated components
classes.keywords: outdated|vulnerable component|known cve|vulnerable dependency|end of life

classes.name: Improper input validation and business logic abuse
classes.keywords: input validation|business logic|negative quantity|price manipulation|coupon|parameter tampering|mass assignment
